title: API Documentation
subtitle: Manage study data by integrating with external tools
publicSubtitle: Manage study data by integrating with external tools using ReeeeecallStudy API

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.step1Auth: — Generate your API key in the API Key section.
quickStart.step1Public: and generate your API key in Settings.
quickStart.step3: Start making API calls! Check the endpoints below.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Use the ReeeeecallStudy API to manage study data from external tools, scripts, and apps.

what.title: What is the API?
what.body: The ReeeeecallStudy API is a RESTful API that lets you view and manage decks, cards, templates, and more via HTTP requests. Use it for automation scripts, third-party app integration, and data analysis.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.body:
The base URL for all API requests.

Base URL: https://reeeeecallstudy.xyz/api/v1

responseFormat.title: Response Format
responseFormat.body:
All responses are in JSON format with Content-Type: application/json.

On success, resources are returned wrapped in { "data": ... } format.
On error, responses follow { "error": { "code": "...", "message": "..." } } format.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: All requests are authenticated using an API key.

getKey.title: Getting an API Key
getKey.body:
Settings → API Key section → Click 'Generate New API Key'.
Enter a name (max 64 chars) to receive a 35-character key starting with rc_.

⚠️ The key is only shown once. Copy it to a safe place!

method.title: Authentication Method
method.body:
Pass your API key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

Authorization: Bearer rc_your_api_key_here

Missing or invalid keys return 401 Unauthorized.

management.title: Key Management
management.body:
• You can have up to 1 API key
• If lost, delete the existing key and create a new one
• Delete unused keys immediately
• Use environment variables instead of hardcoding keys

rateLimits.title: Rate Limits
rateLimits.description: Request counts are limited for API stability.

free.title: Free Tier
free.body:
• Daily API requests: 1,000
• API calls per minute: 60
• Card creates per minute: 30
• Bulk card creates per minute: 5 (max 100 per request)
• Total cards: 5,000
• Total decks: 50

pro.title: Pro Tier
pro.body:
• Daily API requests: 10,000
• API calls per minute: 300
• Card creates per minute: 120
• Bulk card creates per minute: 20
• Total cards: 50,000
• Total decks: 500

exceeded.title: When Limits Are Exceeded
exceeded.body:
Returns 429 Too Many Requests.

Response headers include:
• X-RateLimit-Limit: Max requests
• X-RateLimit-Remaining: Remaining requests
• Retry-After: Wait time in seconds

profile.title: Profile API
profile.description: Retrieve the current user's profile information.

me.description: Retrieve the profile of the current API key owner. Auto-creates profile if it doesn't exist.

list.description: Retrieve all decks for the user.

detail.description: Retrieve detailed information and card statistics (total/new/due) for a specific deck.

list.description: Retrieve cards in a specific deck with pagination.

create.description: Add a new card to a deck. Single card or bulk create up to 100.

detail.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific card by card ID.

delete.description: Delete a specific card by card ID. This action cannot be undone.

templates.title: Templates API
templates.description: View, create, update, and delete card templates.

list.description: Retrieve all card templates for the user.

detail.description: Retrieve full template information including fields and layouts.

update.description: Partially update an existing template. Only provided fields are updated.

delete.description: Delete a template. Cannot delete if cards are using this template (409 error).

marketplace.title: Marketplace API
marketplace.description: Publish and manage decks on the marketplace.

detail.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific marketplace listing.

create.description: Publish your deck to the marketplace.

delete.description: Remove a listing from the marketplace.

shares.title: Sharing API
shares.description: Share decks with other users and manage invitations.

create.description: Create a deck share. Can send invite links or email invitations.

accept.description: Accept a share invitation using an invite code.

list.description: Retrieve sent and received share lists.

examples.title: Code Examples
examples.description: Examples of calling the API with various languages and tools.

errors.title: Error Handling
errors.description: Error response format and common error codes.

statusCodes.title: HTTP Status Codes
statusCodes.body:
• 200 OK — Success
• 201 Created — Resource created
• 400 Bad Request — Invalid request (missing fields, validation failure)
• 401 Unauthorized — Auth failure (missing or invalid API key)
• 404 Not Found — Resource not found
• 409 Conflict — Resource conflict (e.g., deleting a template in use)
• 429 Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded
• 500 Internal Server Error — Server error

validation.title: Validation Errors
